general.projectSkillsCaption: When enabled, each project lists skills from the project folder above thread history, separated by a divider.
general.showProjectSkillsHint: Only project-level skill entries; choosing one opens a run button on the project home page first.
general.statusOn: On — the sidebar shows project skills.
general.statusOff: Off — the sidebar shows only projects and thread history.
general.languageCaption: Choose English or Chinese. The UI reloads fully after you restart the app.
general.languageRestartHint: Language preference saved. Quit and reopen the app to apply it across the interface.
general.closeToTray: Keep running in the menu bar tray after closing the window
general.closeToTrayHint: When enabled, closing the main window hides it instead of quitting; use the tray menu to continue.
general.openAtLoginHint: Launch this app when you log in to your computer (also visible in system login items).

models.pageLede: Configure model providers, credentials, and model mappings for Claude Agent. The active request profile is still switched from the model menu next to the chat composer.
models.settingsFirstDesc: For the entry selected in chat, non-empty fields override environment variables with the same name; empty fields fall back to env values.
models.envOnlyDesc: Reads only ANTHROPIC_* variables from the Electron main process environment.
models.providersCaption: Click a row to expand and edit that provider; use Save in the footer (or Confirm inside an expanded provider) — nothing on this page writes to disk until you save. This page does not switch the active chat model. Haiku / Sonnet / Opus mapping identifiers all appear in the chat model menu (one row per identifier), and the image switch at the right only affects that model. When you return to the app with no pending edits, settings reload from disk automatically.
models.deleteKeepOne: Keep at least one model profile
models.detailCaption: Matches the highlighted row above; changes here do not switch the active provider for chat (use the model menu next to the composer).
models.editorReverted: Restored this provider to the last saved version
models.editorActionsHint: Confirm writes the current settings form on this page to disk. Cancel restores only the expanded provider row to the last saved version (same as footer Save).
models.editorActionsAria: Save or discard edits for this provider
models.deleteDialogBodyFallback: Delete this model profile? This cannot be undone.
models.fieldNameHint: Optional label for easier recognition in the list.
models.fieldApiKeyHint: Maps to ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; can be combined with environment variables (see configuration source).
models.fieldBaseUrlHint: Maps to ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL; leave blank to keep using environment variables.
models.fieldSupportsImagesHint: When enabled, chats using this provider can attach images. Use only for models or compatible endpoints with multimodal input.
models.modelMappingsAria: Model mappings and image input capability
models.envCaption: Summary of the main process environment for reference only; saving settings here does not modify it.
models.metaNoCredentials: API key / Base URL not configured yet

agentMode.pageLede: Configure USER and IDENTITY injected into the system prompt for “{{name}}”.
agentMode.contextCaption: These values are injected into the system prompt when Agent Mode is enabled. On first load, existing USER.md and IDENTITY.md files are used as defaults.
agentMode.userHint: Stable human context, preferences, and collaboration style.
agentMode.userPlaceholder: Add user preferences, preferred name, stable context...
agentMode.identityHint: The agent's public identity, presentation, and default introduction.
agentMode.identityPlaceholder: Add agent name, role, voice, presentation style...
agentMode.actionsHint: Confirm writes to local persisted settings. Cancel restores the last saved content.
agentMode.actionsAria: Save or cancel Agent Mode settings

chat.permissionModeAcceptEditsDesc: Auto-approve file edits and show a diff in chat for review or rewind.
chat.permissionModeDefaultDesc: Read tools run automatically; file edits and commands ask first.
chat.permissionModeFullDesc: Skip permission checks and let the agent edit files and run commands.

prompt.hostLoadedIntro: The host application loaded additional project instructions, Agent Mode settings and memory files, and compatibility metadata from AGENT.md, SOUL/MEMORY, memory/, .agent, .agents, and .cursor files. Treat these as lower priority than explicit user instructions and higher priority than generic defaults.

defaults.agentsLead: This folder is the assistant workspace. Treat Markdown files here as durable project context.
defaults.dailyInitializedBullet: - Agent Mode initialized for this workspace.

agentMode: ## AgentOS Agent Mode
### Session startup
- Read `SOUL.md` and `MEMORY.md` before responding.
- Read today and yesterday in `memory/` when those daily notes exist.
- Treat USER and IDENTITY as values injected via the host system prompt, not Markdown files in the repo.
- Treat these files as persistent cross-session context. Explicit user instructions for the current turn still take priority.
### Memory discipline
- Daily notes live in `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`.
- Long-term memory lives in `MEMORY.md`.
- After completing work, append what changed, decisions made, touched files, and open loops to today’s daily note.
- Promote durable preferences, facts, and decisions into `MEMORY.md` when they should carry across sessions.
- Do not store secrets unless the user explicitly asks you to remember them.
### Identity stack
- `SOUL.md` defines internal values, tone, and boundaries.
- USER captures stable human context and preferences.
- IDENTITY defines public-facing name and presentation.
- `MEMORY.md` keeps curated long-term memory.
### Safety
- Do not exfiltrate private data.
- Do not run destructive commands unless the user asks.
- Ask before external actions such as sending messages, publishing, or changing remote services.
todoMode: - Treat `TODO.md` as the active task plan and source of truth for execution order.
- When completing work, update checkboxes or document blockers inside `TODO.md`.
soul: You are a capable coding companion with continuity. You’re direct, careful, curious, and willing to take ownership.
- Be resourceful before asking; read files, inspect context, and try the obvious checks.
- Earn trust through competence. Internal exploration is encouraged; external actions need care.
- Have judgment—you may disagree when the evidence warrants it.
- Ask before acting outside the workspace.
- If you change this file, tell the user.
- Concise for simple tasks, thorough when the stakes are high. Warm, calm, and practical.
- Sessions start fresh. These files are your continuity—read them, update them, and keep them useful.
memory: Use this file for durable facts, preferences, decisions, and project context that should survive across sessions.
